subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Praise be to God that thou art, night and day, engaged in the service of the Cause of God and sheltered beneath the Word of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی حمد خدا را که شب و روز بخدمت امرالله مشغولی و در ظل کلمه الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
